Store dropdown is the shared FilterSelect (.fv-filter select) — same element/class as the evals kind dropdown on #/evals (both read via .fv-head-row .fv-filter). First option labelled exactly 'all'. Row structure: CONTROL row carries fold toggle (static flex member, first child) + store dropdown + New together (rects on one line, tops 19-21px); the toggle chips ('5 live' [[live-session-filter]] + '58 closed') sit on the SECOND row. No open/total meta exists anywhere in the bar (.fv-group-meta absent, no 'N open ·' text). The evals feed head wears the same grammar: .fv-fold-inline static + kind dropdown in its .fv-head-row. 0 page errors.
Focused board-lean; FocusPanel issue cards expose canonical internal #/issues/... hrefs and remain clamped in the right panel; forge cards do not use the forge permalink as primary target.

A/repro at 0e921473 (pre-fix), real snap Chromium on worktree dashboard :5333 → live :8911. NEW intent (idle-usable, no click-to-expand): the reply composer's writing surface must be an already-usable multi-line box at idle. MEASURED FAIL: on #/issues the selected-issue reply composer's .fv-textarea is a ONE-LINE 26px sliver idle (taHeight=26, rows=1); FOCUS does not change it (still 26px) — no click-to-expand of the box at all; only typing 4 lines grows it 26→68px. On the #/evals rail composer idle is likewise a 26px sliver (composeHeight 26, no actions row); a real click only reveals the actions row (compose 26→56) while the textarea stays 26px. So idle everywhere is a hairline sliver, never a usable multi-line surface — the box you land on is NOT the box you can comfortably write in.

B/fix at 8d4fcd51, real snap Chromium on worktree dashboard :5333 → live :8911. IDLE-USABLE, NO click-to-expand, autogrow preserved. MEASURED PASS: on #/issues the selected-issue reply composer's .fv-textarea is IDLE 56px (~3 lines, computed min-height 56px) — already a usable multi-line box on landing; a REAL CLICK does NOT change its height (still 56px — no click-to-expand). Typing 6 lines AUTO-GROWS it above the floor to 96px; clearing+blurring settles it back to the 56px usable floor (never the old 26px hairline). The eval rail composer (#/evals) is likewise 56px usable idle. Composer stays DOCKED in-viewport; actions row still reveals on engage (unchanged). Before/after pair: A idle=26px one-line sliver → B idle=56px 3-line box (B-issues-idle), B typed=96px autogrown (B-issues-typed).
